Preparation: Used In Absinthe Or Smoked With Caution

Mechanism of Action: May modulate dopamine and serotonin; some MAO inhibitory action suspected
Pharmacokinetics: Onset 30–60 min, oral or alcoholic extract. Mild duration (~2–3 hours)
Therapeutic Uses: Relaxation, aphrodisiac, mild euphoria, sleep aid
Contraindications: Avoid with MAOIs, sedatives, or alcohol
Toxicity: Low; very high doses can cause nausea and vomiting
